---
title: Tinyrack Starlight Adapter
description: A realistic Starlight fixture for validating every public docs component in the Tinyrack theme.
---

import {
  Aside,
  Badge,
  Card,
  CardGrid,
  Code,
  FileTree,
  Icon,
  LinkButton,
  LinkCard,
  Steps,
  Tabs,
  TabItem,
} from '@astrojs/starlight/components';

# Tinyrack Starlight Adapter <Badge text="Fixture" variant="success" />

<Icon name="starlight" label="Starlight" size="1.5rem" /> This page verifies that
the packaged Tinyrack theme can be consumed by Astro Starlight and that every
public Starlight authoring component renders at least once.

<Aside type="tip" title="Theme boundary">
Starlight owns navigation, search, routing, and MDX behavior. Tinyrack maps the
shared design tokens into Starlight color, typography, and surface variables.
</Aside>

<LinkButton href="#install" icon="right-arrow">Start setup</LinkButton>
<LinkButton href="#release-check" variant="secondary" icon="approve-check-circle">
Review release checks
</LinkButton>

## Install

<Tabs syncKey="package-manager">
  <TabItem label="pnpm" icon="pnpm">
    <Code code={`pnpm add @tinyrack/themes @astrojs/starlight astro`} lang="sh" />
  </TabItem>
  <TabItem label="npm" icon="npm">
    <Code code={`npm install @tinyrack/themes @astrojs/starlight astro`} lang="sh" />
  </TabItem>
  <TabItem label="yarn" icon="node">
    <Code code={`yarn add @tinyrack/themes @astrojs/starlight astro`} lang="sh" />
  </TabItem>
</Tabs>

## Configure

<Code
  code={`import starlight from '@astrojs/starlight';
import { defineConfig } from 'astro/config';
import { withTinyrackStarlightTheme } from '@tinyrack/themes/astro/starlight';

export default defineConfig({
  integrations: [
    starlight(
      withTinyrackStarlightTheme({
        title: 'Rack Runbook',
        customCss: ['./src/styles/global.css'],
      }),
    ),
  ],
});`}
  lang="js"
  meta='title="astro.config.mjs"'
/>

## Content Patterns

<CardGrid stagger>
  <Card title="Adapter config" icon="setting">
    Keep package CSS first so project-level Starlight overrides still win.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Authoring components" icon="open-book">
    Cards, asides, tabs, links, badges, file trees, and steps should feel native.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Fixture build" icon="approve-check-circle">
    The Astro fixture catches regressions in package exports and Starlight MDX usage.
  </Card>
</CardGrid>

<LinkCard
  href="#configure"
  title="Adapter configuration"
  description="Review the Starlight wrapper and custom CSS load order."
/>

## Project Structure

<FileTree>
- astro.config.mjs
- src/
  - content/
    - docs/
      - index.mdx
  - styles/
    - global.css
- package.json
</FileTree>

## Release Check

<Steps>
1. **Build the package.** Generate type declarations and copy packaged CSS.
2. **Build this fixture.** Confirm Starlight can resolve the adapter and public docs components.
3. **Review Storybook.** Check content width, sidebar density, cards, asides, links, and code contrast.
</Steps>

| Surface | Expected result |
| --- | --- |
| Sidebar | Compact navigation with readable active state |
| Content | Clear hierarchy, comfortable line length, and strong code contrast |
| Components | Every Starlight authoring component inherits Tinyrack theme variables |
